meta.name: ABILITY_LINESHOT_NAME

A stronger attack that hits all units in a straight line.

An attack that hits and Immobilizes all units in a perpendicular line.

meta.name: ABILITY_MARKED_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Marked on a unit.

meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Marked on a unit and all other units of the same type.

meta.name: ABILITY_SCATTERSHOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Fire a bunch of shots randomly in an area.
Fire a bunch of shots randomly in a large area.

meta.name: ABILITY_BRAMBLESHOT_NAME

Fire a shot that spawns brambles in a large area.

meta.name: ABILITY_BEARTRAP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Set a trap within 5 tiles that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.
Set a trap on any tile that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.

meta.name: ABILITY_HARPOON_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Hook onto something in a straight line and drag yourself to it.

Hook onto something in a straight line and drag yourself to it.

meta.name: ABILITY_TWINSHOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot twice.
Shoot thrice.

meta.name: ABILITY_CROSSSHOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot four projectiles in an X shape.
Shoot four penetrating projectiles in an X shape.

meta.name: ABILITY_BAITTRAP_NAME

Set a bait trap that attracts enemies and inflicts Poison and Slow when eaten.

meta.name: ABILITY_BOMBSHOT_NAME

Toss a large bomb that explodes and knocks units away.

meta.name: ABILITY_SUMMONBRAMBLES_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn brambles on any tile.
Spawn brambles in an area.

meta.name: ABILITY_FIRESHOT_NAME

Shoot a projectile with infinite range that inflicts Burn 4 and lights fires.

meta.name: ABILITY_TRAILBLAZER_NAME

Double your movement.  You're unaffected by tile effects until the end of the turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_FOCUSSHOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Aim at a unit. On your next turn, shoot a projectile that always crits and ignores shield at that unit.
Shoot a projectile that always crits and ignores shield.

meta.name: ABILITY_SHARDS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot a projectile that spawns glass.
Shoot a projectile that spawns glass in an area and inflicts Bleed 2.

meta.name: ABILITY_TERRAINWALK_NAME

Teleport to any grass or water tile. Gain Stealth.

meta.desc_resolved: Give a unit +3 range and reach until the end of their next turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_EXTEND_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give a unit +20 range and reach until the end of their next turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_CHAOSSHOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot a random unit within range.
Shoot a random unit within range, twice!

meta.name: ABILITY_NEEDLESHOT_NAME

Shoot a needle that deals damage, gives Thorns, and ignores shield. This deals extra damage to enemies and gives extra Thorns to allies.

meta.name: ABILITY_SPIKETRAP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Set a trap that deals 8 damage.
Set a trap that deals 13 damage.

meta.name: ABILITY_FLEASHOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot a flea at a unit.
Shoot a [img:champion] flea at a unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_WEBTRAP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Set a trap that webs non-bug units that walk through it.
Set a web trap on any tile that webs non-bug units that walk through it.

meta.name: ABILITY_LASTHIT_NAME

Deal 1 damage to a unit. If this kills it, refresh your basic attack. This ignores shield and can't miss.

meta.name: ABILITY_CUPIDSARROW_NAME

A shot that damages and inflicts Charm 2.

meta.name: ABILITY_ARROWFLURRY_NAME

Shoot 5 weak shots, each one has a 50% chance to miss and 50% chance to crit!

meta.name: ABILITY_HEAVYSHOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot a high damage shot with a 70% chance to miss.

Shoot a high damage shot with a 70% chance to miss and a 50% chance to crit.

meta.name: ABILITY_STAKEOUT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage.
[s:.7](Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn.)[/s]

End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage.
[s:.7](Costs 0 mana. Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn other than your movement action.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_BALLOFSPIDERS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Throw a spider egg that spawns 3 spiderlings on impact.
Throw a stronger spider egg that spawns 3 spiderlings on impact.

meta.name: ABILITY_SNIPE_NAME

Fire a stronger shot exactly 6 tiles away that ignores shield, can't miss, and has a 50% chance to crit.

meta.name: ABILITY_DIVERSION_NAME

Shoot a pebble. All enemies within 3 tiles move toward it and gain Confusion.

meta.name: ABILITY_ARROWSMITH_NAME

You or another unit gains +1 Bonus Attack at the start of their next turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_TACTICALRETREAT_NAME

Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a baited bear trap on the tile you teleported from.

meta.name: ABILITY_INFEST_NAME

Toss a spider egg that deals low damage and inflicts Infested 2.

meta.name: ABILITY_SENTRYMODE_NAME

meta.name: ABILITY_SENTRYMODE_NAME

meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Charm on a unit. If it's an enemy, it takes an extra turn immediately.

meta.name: ABILITY_PHEROMONES_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Charm on a unit. It takes an extra turn immediately.

Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.
